creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=de76b908d6d54cb95ee90555f8e0ba5f5d1af44b

commit de76b908d6d54cb95ee90555f8e0ba5f5d1af44b
Author:     Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu>
AuthorDate: 2023-02-20 15:45:56 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-02-20 21:29:05 +0000

    net-p2p/readarr: Update to 0.1.3.1584

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Readarr/Readarr/releases/tag/v0.1.3.1584

     * Creating new Delay Profile
     * e03390c Delete azuresync.yml
     * Settings fail to save for some auth setups
     * Remove old OMG implementation and Rarbg
     * Book status always green on Book Index page
     * Readarr to Readarr import list adds random results
     * 8b9cada Don't return early after re-running checks after startup grace period
     * Delay health check notifications on startup
     * Queue conflicts with the same download in multiple clients
     * Download client name in history details
     * Add backup size information
     * Notifiarr and Webhook Updates
     * Correctly handle Content-Encoding headers
     * Clearing logs not updating UI once complete
     * d7d57f0 Updated some JS dependencies
     * 8258323 Add Volta node config
     * Add import date to upgrads in CustomScript and Webhook connections
     * Improve moving file to location where another one exists
     * d8f11bc Replace unicode brackets
     * Migrating case-sensitive Preferred Word REGEX to Custom Formats
     * Ping endpoint no longer requires authentication
     * 388fb52 Fixed cutoff unmet integration tests
     * Cutoff Unmet showing items above lowest accepted quality when upgrades are disabled
     * Custom Formats

    PR:             269712
    Reported by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)

 net-p2p/readarr/Makefile | 2 +-
 net-p2p/readarr/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)
